recentNews.title: Fact Check: Is 'Stop Trump' Craigslist ad recruiting paid protesters from January 2026 real?
recentNews.snippet: On January 10, a Facebook user posted a picture of the Craigslist ad. The caption of the post read, "'Stop Trump' Craigslist ad recruiting paid protesters from January 2026. Let's stop pretending this is 'activism'."
